profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.signOutMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.deleteAccountMessage:
If you delete your account, you will not be able to recover it later.

You can create a new account with the same number in the future, but Tawreed will not retain any of your data or personal information after the account is deleted.

Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.deleteAccountSuccess:
Your account has been deleted successfully.

We hope to see you again in the future.
profile.loginForMore: Sign in to access all features

sessionExpired.subtitle: For your account's security, you've been signed out automatically. Sign in again to continue.
sessionExpired.securityNote: We do this to keep your account and personal information secure.

maintenance.title: Scheduled Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: We're updating our systems to serve you better. We'll be back soon!
maintenance.estimatedTime: We're working to finish as soon as possible
maintenance.note: We're improving the app for a better and faster experience.

generic.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred. Try again later or contact us for help.
